rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 18, 2015, line 1. rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIA VS. BRIAN JOHN THORSTENSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 18, 2015, line 11. DEFENDANTS BRIAN THORSTENSON AND KEGAN MARLING Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is DENIED. Notice of Intent includes sufficient information re: "rent applicable to each residential unit;" Plaintiff complied with Govt. Code 7060.4(b)(5); advice regarding re-rental rights was sufficient. = (501/req)
